heading: Imposition of sanctions with respect to activities of the Russian Federation undermining cybersecurity
label: 9524 Imposition of sanctions with respect to activities of the Russian Federation undermining cybersecurity

children.label: A
children.text: knowingly engages in significant activities undermining cybersecurity against any person, including a democratic institution, or government on behalf of the Government of the Russian Federation; or

children.label: B
children.text: is owned or controlled by, or acts or purports to act for or on behalf of, directly or indirectly, a person described in subparagraph (A);

impose five or more of the sanctions described in with respect to any person that the President determines knowingly materially assists, sponsors, or provides financial, material, or technological support for, or goods or services (except financial services) in support of, an activity described in paragraph (1)(A); andsection 9529 of this title

impose three or more of the sanctions described in with respect to any person that the President determines knowingly provides financial services in support of an activity described in paragraph (1)(A).section 8923(c) of this title

children.heading: Asset blocking
children.label: 1 Asset blocking
children.text: The exercise of all powers granted to the President by the International Emergency Economic Powers Act ( et seq.) to the extent necessary to block and prohibit all transactions in all property and interests in property of a person determined by the President to be subject to subsection (a)(1) if such property and interests in property are in the United States, come within the United States, or are or come within the possession or control of a United States person.50 U.S.C. 1701

children.heading: Exclusion from the United States and revocation of visa or other documentation
children.label: 2 Exclusion from the United States and revocation of visa or other documentation
children.text: In the case of an alien determined by the President to be subject to subsection (a)(1), denial of a visa to, and exclusion from the United States of, the alien, and revocation in accordance with , of any visa or other documentation of the alien.section 1201(i) of title 8

children.heading: Application of new cyber sanctions
children.label: c Application of new cyber sanctions
A
children.text: is in the vital national security interests of the United States; or

children.label: B
children.text: will further the enforcement of this chapter; and
a certification that the Government of the Russian Federation has made significant efforts to reduce the number and intensity of cyber intrusions conducted by that Government.

children.heading: Significant activities undermining cybersecurity defined
children.label: d Significant activities undermining cybersecurity defined
A
children.text: to deny access to or degrade, disrupt, or destroy an information and communications technology system or network; or

children.label: ii
children.text: causing a significant misappropriation of funds, economic resources, trade secrets, personal identifications, or financial information for commercial or competitive advantage or private financial gain;
